title: App Settings- General - Account - Invite to second tenant, UI
scenario: Multiple Lens account invites display, accept, and decline behavior in Poly Lens Menu > General > Account and Support > App tenant info verification
steps: 1. Cloud Admin sends two invites for different Lens accounts to the mobile user's email.
2. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Navigate to Poly Lens Menu → General → Account.
4. Log in with the user's credentials.
5. Verify that both invites are displayed.
7. Verify that the invites are no longer visible.
8. Log back in with the same credentials.
9. Verify that both invites are displayed again.
10. Accept one of the two invites.
11. Verify that the accepted invite is removed and the other invite remains.
12. Navigate to Poly Lens Menu → Support → App.
13. Verify that the tenant information displayed matches the accepted invite.
14. Return to Poly Lens Menu → General → Account.
16. Verify that the declined invite is removed.
17. Navigate to Poly Lens Menu → Support → App.
18. Verify that the tenant information remains unchanged and still matches the accepted invite.
expected: Both invites appear after login; logging out hides them; logging back in shows both; accepting one removes it while the other remains; tenant info in Support > App matches the accepted invite; declining the remaining invite removes it; tenant info in Support > App remains unchanged and still matches the accepted invite.
